introSection: Tornado was a steel roller coaster previously located at Playcenter São Paulo in São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Tornado opened in 1982 in Playcenter São Paulo, it is unknown if it ever operated at another location before arriving there. It would eventually close at São Paulo in 2001, becoming SBNO up untill 2003, after which it was taken down and shipped to Beto Carrero World. It would be fully constructed there, but never operated, eventually being taken down around 2008-2011. The coaster was then scrapped permanently.

fullText:
Tornado was a steel roller coaster previously located at Playcenter São Paulo in São Paulo, São Paulo, Brazil.

Tornado opened in 1982 in Playcenter São Paulo, it is unknown if it ever operated at another location before arriving there. It would eventually close at São Paulo in 2001, becoming SBNO up untill 2003, after which it was taken down and shipped to Beto Carrero World. It would be fully constructed there, but never operated, eventually being taken down around 2008-2011. The coaster was then scrapped permanently.



Yellow track and black supports.
